{{Quote|There are mentions in ancient records that there was a Sith academy here long, long ago.|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], to [[Ben Skywalker]]|<ref name="Backlash">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Backlash]]''</ref>}}
The '''[[Sith academy]] of [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]''' was established by the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] near the end of the [[New Sith Wars]]. They used it to [[Sith training|train]] [[Sith acolyte/Legends|Sith adepts]] and [[Sith acolyte/Legends|acolytes]]. Trainees here were apprenticed to [[Sith Master/Legends|Sith Masters]]. The skills learned here equipped adepts with abilities on par with [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]]. These warriors made up the bulk of the Brotherhood's armies.
